== Notes for [[Item:Q58102|Q58102]] ==

Jorg FREY Birth 6 Jan 1553 Knonau,,,Zurich,SWITZERLAND, Died 4 Nov 1635 Knonau,,,Zurich,SWITZERLAND,

Family 1 Margret BURGESTER Married 7 Jan 1578 Knonau,,,Zurich,SWITZERLAND, Children 1. Jacob FREY, b. 1581
2. Hans Heinrich FREY, b. 1587, Kanton,,,Zurich,SWITZERLAND,

Family 2 Anna STAHELI Children
1. Marti FREY, b. 28 Sep 1589
2. Anna FREY, b. 1593
3. Elisabeth FREY, b. 1594
4. Barbara FREY, b. 1597
5. Hans Heinrich FREY, b. 1601
6. Felix FREY, b. 1605
7. Hans Rudolph FREY, b. 13 Dec 1612
=========================================

2. JORG2 FREY (MARTI1) was born January 06, 1553/54 in Knonau, Zurich, Switzerland, and died November 04, 1635 in Knonau, Zurich, Switzerland. He married MARGARET BURGESTER January 07, 1578/79 in Knonau, Zurich, Switzerland. She was born Abt. 1557 in Switzerland.

More About JORG FREY and MARGARET BURGESTER:
Marriage: January 07, 1578/79, Knonau, Zurich, Switzerland
Children of JORG FREY and MARGARET BURGESTER are: i. JACOB3 FREY, b. Abt. 1580, Knonau, Zurich, Switzerland. 3. ii. HANS HEINRICH FREY, b. Abt. 1583, Knonau, Zurich, Switzerland; d. Bef. 1634, Kanton Zurich, Switzerland. http://familytreemaker.genealogy.com/users/f/l/e/Joseph-F-Fleetwood/FILE/0006text.txt

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
